visual_mappings.chart_title: Active Shift Hours vs Total Hours by Plant
visual_mappings.sql: SELECT plant, MEASURE(active_shift_hours), MEASURE(total_hours) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant

visual_mappings.chart_title: SLE Waterfall Trend - SLE vs CIP by Plant
visual_mappings.sql: SELECT plant, MEASURE(sle_waterfall_sle), MEASURE(sle_waterfall_cip) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant

visual_mappings.chart_title: Production Metrics by Plant and Work Center
visual_mappings.sql: SELECT plant, plant_workcenter_key, bic_cwc_type, MEASURE(production_quantity), MEASURE(paid_hours), MEASURE(epl) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant, plant_workcenter_key, bic_cwc_type
